address2: Çifte Havuzlar Mah. Eski Londra Asfalti Cad Kuluçka Mrk. A2 Blok No:151/1B Iç Kapi No: B01
longBusinessSummary: Kafein Yazilim Hizmetleri Ticaret A.S. provides various software and technology management solutions, services, and products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers Data Focus, a data governance tool to manage enterprise-structured data; Data Touch, a platform for sensitive data monitoring and data usage analytics; Test Data Management, a solution that enables controlled creation, transfer, and management of data required in software development and testing processes; and Dataskope, a database activity monitoring and security solution. It also provides Infraskope, an enterprise security information and event management platform that collects, analyzes, and correlates logs generated from an organization's entire IT infrastructure; APIFORT, a cybersecurity product; Corporate Portal which facilitates intra-corporate processes; and ERPGuard, a solution designed to enhance the security of SAP systems and optimize compliance processes. In addition, the company offers turnkey projects, cyber security solutions, google security operations, cloud solutions, data virtualization consulting, robotic process automation service, data privacy and protection services, outsourcing services, data decision management systems consultancy, test management consultancy, digital transformation consultancy, data warehouse consulting, managed technology services, software development, advanced analytics solutions, and IT operation management services. It serves technology, banking, telecommunications, tourism, services, retail, and insurance sectors. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
